name: Interven Guard
description: POSTs outbound tool calls to Interven /v1/scan (ALLOW/DENY/SANITIZE/REQUIRE_APPROVAL) before execution.

gatewayUrl.title: Interven base URL
gatewayUrl.description: Overrides INTERVEN_GATEWAY_URL when set. Default: https://api.intervensecurity.com

apiKey.title: API key
apiKey.description: Overrides INTERVEN_API_KEY when set. Prefer the env var on shared hosts. Format: iv_live_*

guardedTools.title: Guarded tools
guardedTools.description: Which built-in OpenClaw tools to scan. Defaults to all five: web_fetch, exec, web_search, browser, message. Set ['web_fetch'] to only scan outbound HTTP fetches.
